title: LinGet TUI Facelift
description: Refresh the LinGet TUI for clearer hierarchy, better readability, and improved scan-ability without changing behavior.

title: US-001: Introduce a cohesive visual theme and layout rhythm
description:
As a user, I want the TUI to feel cohesive and intentional, with consistent borders, emphasis, and spacing. The layout should align panel titles, section spacing, and table header styling for quick scanning.

### Impact Table
| Path | Change | Purpose | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| src/cli/tui/ui.rs | modify | Centralize styles and apply consistent layout styling | |
| src/cli/tui/mod.rs | modify | Expose new theme helpers if split into module | Optional: new module re-export |
| src/cli/tui/theme.rs | create | Reusable TUI styles and color palette | Optional file if needed |

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Define a small set of reusable styles (title, panel, dim text, accent, selection).
- [ ] Apply the styles consistently to title bar, panels, and table header.
- [ ] Improve panel separation and padding to make the layout feel less cramped.
- [ ] cargo fmt --check passes
- [ ] cargo clippy -- -D warnings passes
- [ ] cargo test passes
- [ ] Run the TUI locally: cargo run -- tui

title: US-002: Add a package details panel for the current selection
description:
As a user, I want to see key details of the selected package (description, versions, status) without pressing Enter. This panel should update as I move the selection.

### Impact Table
| Path | Change | Purpose | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| src/cli/tui/ui.rs | modify | Add details panel layout and rendering | |
| src/cli/tui/app.rs | modify | Provide any helper methods for selected package fields | Optional (if needed) |

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Details panel shows package name, installed version, available version (if any), source, and description.
- [ ] When no package is selected, the panel shows a helpful empty state message.
- [ ] Details panel respects loading and empty states without crashing.
- [ ] cargo fmt --check passes
- [ ] cargo clippy -- -D warnings passes
- [ ] cargo test passes
- [ ] Run the TUI locally: cargo run -- tui

title: US-003: Refresh search and confirm popups for clarity
description:
As a user, I want search and confirm popups to be visually distinct and readable. The prompt should clearly indicate what action is being confirmed or what text I am entering.

### Impact Table
| Path | Change | Purpose | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| src/cli/tui/ui.rs | modify | Redesign popup layout and styles | |
| src/cli/tui/app.rs | modify | Improve confirm message text formatting | |

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Search popup shows a labeled input field with cursor indicator.
- [ ] Confirm popup clearly shows the action (install/remove) and the package name.
- [ ] Popups include consistent borders and contrast against the background.
- [ ] cargo fmt --check passes
- [ ] cargo clippy -- -D warnings passes
- [ ] cargo test passes
- [ ] Run the TUI locally: cargo run -- tui

title: US-004: Improve status and command bars for quick scanning
description:
As a user, I want the status and command bars to be easier to parse. Key hints should be grouped, and status should be concise and readable.

### Impact Table
| Path | Change | Purpose | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| src/cli/tui/ui.rs | modify | Redesign status and command bars | |
| src/cli/tui/app.rs | modify | Optional helpers for status text formatting | |

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Command bar groups related actions (navigation, filters, actions, quit).
- [ ] Status bar highlights mode and shows concise status text with optional loading indicator.
- [ ] Status remains readable when messages are long (truncate or wrap intentionally).
- [ ] cargo fmt --check passes
- [ ] cargo clippy -- -D warnings passes
- [ ] cargo test passes
- [ ] Run the TUI locally: cargo run -- tui

title: Auto-scroll Task Hub log view to latest line
description:
Improve Task Hub log UX: when a task is actively streaming logs, keep the log view scrolled to the newest line.

Context: Task Hub currently appends labels into an ExpanderRow, and the overall popover is inside a ScrolledWindow.

Work:
- Track/obtain the relevant GtkAdjustment (vadjustment) and scroll to bottom when AppendTaskLog arrives.
- Avoid stealing scroll position when user manually scrolls up (optional but preferred).
acceptance_criteria: With log streaming active, new log lines remain visible without manual scrolling.

title: Add log streaming support for non-APT backends
description:
Extend real-time Task Hub log streaming beyond APT.

Context: We already have src/backend/streaming.rs (run_streaming + ANSI stripping) and src/backend/traits.rs provides *_streaming fallbacks. Only AptBackend implements streaming today.

Work:
- Implement install_streaming/remove_streaming/update_streaming for other backends where feasible (Flatpak, Snap, Dnf, etc.).
- Use run_streaming for non-privileged commands; use run_pkexec_with_logs when pkexec is required.
- Update UI glue so operations use *_streaming for all sources (not Apt-only), and Task Hub receives AppendTaskLog events.
acceptance_criteria: Running install/remove/update for non-APT sources shows live logs in Task Hub without blocking UI.

title: Refactor relm_app streaming wiring into helper
description:
Reduce duplication in src/ui/relm_app.rs for log streaming setup.

Context: Install/Remove/Update for Apt currently each create a tokio mpsc channel and spawn a relay task that maps StreamLine -> AppMsg::AppendLog.

Work:
- Extract this pattern into a helper (e.g. spawn_log_relay(task_id, sender) -> mpsc::Sender<StreamLine>).
- Prefer a single implementation used by install/remove/update (and later bulk ops).
acceptance_criteria: relm_app streaming wiring has no copy/paste blocks; behavior unchanged.

title: LinGet TUI UX Improvements
description: Recommended UI/UX enhancements for the TUI: add package details panel, add console/log view, improve layout hierarchy, refine key hint grouping, and clarify empty/loading states. Scope excludes backend changes unless required to surface log output.

title: US-001: Restructure main layout with details panel
description:
As a user, I want a persistent details panel so I can scan package info without extra keystrokes. The main layout should show sources, packages, and details in clear columns.

### Impact Table
| Path | Change | Purpose | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| src/cli/tui/ui.rs | modify | Split main layout into sources/packages/details columns | |
| src/cli/tui/theme.rs | modify | Add any new panel styles if needed | Optional |

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Main content splits into three columns: Sources (left), Packages (center), Details (right).
- [ ] Column widths feel balanced on typical terminal widths (80–140 cols).
- [ ] Details panel is visible in normal mode and respects active panel highlighting rules.
- [ ] cargo fmt --check passes
- [ ] cargo clippy -- -D warnings passes
- [ ] cargo test passes
- [ ] Run the TUI locally: cargo run -- tui

title: US-002: Populate package details panel
description:
As a user, I want the details panel to show key metadata for the selected package so I don’t need to press Enter to inspect it.

### Impact Table
| Path | Change | Purpose | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| src/cli/tui/ui.rs | modify | Render package details content | |
| src/cli/tui/app.rs | modify | Add helpers for selected package fields if needed | Optional |

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Details panel shows name, source, status, installed version, and available version when present.
- [ ] Description text is shown and truncated or wrapped intentionally.
- [ ] When no package is available (loading or empty), panel shows an appropriate empty state.
- [ ] cargo fmt --check passes
- [ ] cargo clippy -- -D warnings passes
- [ ] cargo test passes
- [ ] Run the TUI locally: cargo run -- tui

title: US-003: Add console view for recent status/output
description:
As a user, I want a console panel to see recent status messages and action output so I understand what the TUI is doing.

### Impact Table
| Path | Change | Purpose | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| src/cli/tui/app.rs | modify | Store a rolling buffer of console messages | |
| src/cli/tui/ui.rs | modify | Render console panel in layout | |
| src/cli/tui/theme.rs | modify | Add styles for console text if needed | Optional |

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Console panel shows the most recent status/actions (install/remove/refresh).
- [ ] Buffer is capped (e.g., last 100 lines) to avoid unbounded growth.
- [ ] Console panel is readable and does not obscure status bar.
- [ ] cargo fmt --check passes
- [ ] cargo clippy -- -D warnings passes
- [ ] cargo test passes
- [ ] Run the TUI locally: cargo run -- tui

title: US-004: Refine key hints and empty/loading states
description:
As a user, I want clearer key hints and empty/loading messages so I can understand what to do at a glance.

### Impact Table
| Path | Change | Purpose | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| src/cli/tui/ui.rs | modify | Update command bar grouping and empty/loading copy | |
| src/cli/tui/theme.rs | modify | Add any highlight styles if needed | Optional |

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Command bar groups related actions with clear separators.
- [ ] Loading and empty states include brief actionable text.
- [ ] Copy changes are concise and consistent with existing tone.
- [ ] cargo fmt --check passes
- [ ] cargo clippy -- -D warnings passes
- [ ] cargo test passes
- [ ] Run the TUI locally: cargo run -- tui

title: US-005: Add update-all action in TUI
description:
As a user, I want an Update All option so I can apply all available updates with one action.

### Impact Table
| Path | Change | Purpose | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| src/cli/tui/app.rs | modify | Handle update-all keybinding and confirmation flow | |
| src/cli/tui/ui.rs | modify | Expose key hint and messaging for update-all | |

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] A new keybinding triggers Update All with a confirmation prompt.
- [ ] Update All runs updates for all packages with updates available.
- [ ] Status/console messaging indicates progress and completion.
- [ ] cargo fmt --check passes
- [ ] cargo clippy -- -D warnings passes
- [ ] cargo test passes
- [ ] Run the TUI locally: cargo run -- tui
